bead.title: Story 6 B2: frontend sort dropdown + staleness chips + URL state contract for all filter params
bead.description:
Build the artifact-listing filter UI on top of B1's GraphQL surface. See /tmp/story-6-final.md.

Changes (frontend only):
- routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/+page.svelte: add a sort dropdown bound to the new ArtifactSort enum; add staleness chip row (e.g. all/fresh/stale).
- +page.ts: parse and serialize URL keys q, mediaType, staleness, sort. Single source of truth: load() reads URL params; UI updates URL via goto/replaceState; load() reruns with new params.
- Reset 'after' cursor whenever any of q/sort/mediaType/staleness changes.
- Empty/cleared state: when all filters cleared, URL is bare /artifacts (no query string).

URL contract (must match TD-NNN once published in B3): q (string), mediaType (single), staleness (single), sort (single ArtifactSort value).
bead.acceptance:
- Sort dropdown reorders list; URL persists sort=.
- Staleness chip filters; URL persists staleness=.
- q/mediaType/staleness/sort compose; pasting a URL with all four reproduces the same view.
- Clearing all filters returns URL to /artifacts.
- Vitest URL-state round-trip test for parse/serialize of all params.
- Playwright e2e covers: server-side q matches across pages, sort change resets pagination, staleness chip filters, URL copy/reload restores state.
- 'cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test && bun run test:e2e' passes.
